  "text": "The Kafka log retention policy is enforced across several key files in sg-evals/kafka--0753c489:\n\n1. **Configuration definitions** (`server-common/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/server/config/ServerLogConfigs.java`): Defines the configuration constants `LOG_RETENTION_TIME_MILLIS_CONFIG` (log.retention.ms), `LOG_RETENTION_TIME_MINUTES_CONFIG`, `LOG_RETENTION_TIME_HOURS_CONFIG`, and `LOG_RETENTION_BYTES_CONFIG` (log.retention.bytes).\n\n2. **Broker config validation** (`core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/KafkaConfig.scala`): Provides `logRetentionTimeMillis` and `logRetentionBytes` accessors and enforces validation: `require(logRetentionTimeMillis >= 1 || logRetentionTimeMillis == -1, \"log.retention.ms must be unlimited (-1) or, greater than or equal to 1\")`.\n\n3. **Dynamic config validation** (`core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/DynamicBrokerConfig.scala`): Contains `validateLogLocalRetentionMs()` and `validateLogLocalRetentionBytes()` which validate that local retention values (for tiered storage) are consistent with the overall `log.retention.ms` and `log.retention.bytes` settings.\n\n4. **Topic-level config validation** (`storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogConfig.java`): Contains `validateValues()`, `validateBrokerLogConfigValues()`, `validateRemoteStorageRetentionSize()`, and `validateRemoteStorageRetentionTime()` to enforce retention constraints. Also defines `localRetentionMs()` and `localRetentionBytes()` methods.\n\n5. **LogManager retention check** (`core/src/main/scala/kafka/log/LogManager.scala`): Schedules and runs `cleanupLogs()` periodically (based on `retentionCheckMs`) which triggers deletion of log segments that breach retention policies.\n\n6. **Segment deletion enforcement** (`storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/UnifiedLog.java`): Implements `deleteRetentionMsBreachedSegments()` (time-based) and `deleteRetentionSizeBreachedSegments()` (size-based), which actually delete log segments that exceed the configured retention limits. Also provides static helpers `localRetentionMs()` and `localRetentionSize()`.\n\n7. **Remote log retention** (`storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/server/log/remote/storage/RemoteLogManager.java`): For tiered storage, manages remote log retention via `RetentionSizeData` and `RetentionTimeData` inner classes and `buildRetentionSizeData()`, enforcing that remote log segments are deleted according to retention policy.\n\n8. **Remote log config** (`storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/server/log/remote/storage/RemoteLogManagerConfig.java`): Defines `LOG_LOCAL_RETENTION_MS_PROP` and `LOG_LOCAL_RETENTION_BYTES_PROP` for local retention within tiered storage, along with their documentation referencing log.retention.ms and log.retention.bytes."
